title: phlomoides umbrosa var. stenocalyx
intro: Phlomoides umbrosa var. stenocalyx, also known as Chinese sage or Chinese mountain sage, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mint family. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Phlomoides umbrosa var. stenocalyx include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting digestive health, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Phlomoides umbrosa var. stenocalyx can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
